title: Cobblemon Shinies Enhanced
description: Changes some not so great shiny pokemon for the cobblemon mod.
body:
This resource pack changes some shiny pokemon that don't change much or are inconsistent. 
**Now updated for Cobblemon 1.7+**
Currently changes shiny textures for the following cobblemon.
- Pichu line made orange to match Raichu
- Nidoqueen made to match opposite of Nidoking
- Cleffa line to match Igglybuff pink and green eyes
- Alolan Vulpix line to pink
- Igglybuff line made to match Wigglytuff
- Venonat made white to match Venomoth
- Meowth line made white
- Abra line made to match Alakazam 
- Gastly line made white to match Mega Gengar
- Scyther made red to match Scizor
- Zapdos made orange to match Galarian Zapdos
- Dragonite made pink to match Dratini and Dragonair

If you want to request a change to a cobblemon or report a bug do so on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/moxg22/cobblemon-shinies-enhanced/issues)
